title: Junkster
short_description: 3D action-platforming on a junkyard world — bot UM-13 builds and wrenches his way back to orbit after a crash landing.
description: Junkster is a 3D action platformer with an awesome building mechanic. Plucky, little construction bot, UM-13 has crash-landed on a dangerous junkyard planet. Armed only with his trusty robo-wrench, Um must repair his ship and recover his lost cargo of precious human artifacts.
